title: RBD-986 She Was Placed In Confinement Until Her Armpit Hairs Grew Out Aoi Mukai - Mukai Ai
description: Immediately after receiving a package I didn't remember, I was attacked by a deliveryman. Criminal ● Packed in the trunk like luggage I was taken to a rough private house where I didn't know where. How many days have passed since then ... The embarrassingly growing armpits showed the length of my life in captivity.
